title: Level 897
wikitext:
{{Cosmic Theme}} {{Background|file=Blackvoid.png}}
[[File:1130-2.gif|20000px]]
{{DISPLAYTITLE:'''Level 897: "Zone Complications"'''}} {{Notice|body=It is advised to use dark mode during reading for the best experience.}}{{Class 3|color-h=238|color-s=100%|color-l=34%|class=Omega|safety=Glitched Properties|security=Strange Effects|entity=Ever-Changing Zone|hexagon=ω}} '''Level 897''' also known as Beyond Human Mind "Zone Complications" is the 898th level of the backrooms. {{Headerbox|file=Housing 897.jpeg|speed=10|header='''You feel emptiness everywhere...'''}} ==Description== '''Level 897''' is a level that comprises of different forms that can shift without warning. Therefore, wanderers need to adapt depending on the various environments. Each form of this level is distinct from the others. It remains unknown if the wanderers will encounter the specific form they were hoping for. Attempts to record a video will result in failure, as an unknown static will interfere and cover the camera, making it impossible to capture clear footage. Any video recorded ends up as complete static, including the sounds captured. This makes it extremely difficult to obtain a clear recording, sometimes taking months to produce just one black-and-white picture. However, there are rare occasions when cameras are able to recover low-quality footage or a colored picture. It is believed by many that all entrances can shift if a transformation occurs, although the reason for this phenomenon is unknown. Fortunately, wanderers may experience shapeshifting without facing any consequences, making it somewhat safer when a transformation occurs. There is no evidence of a wanderer experiencing a shapeshift while inside the level. According to rumors, '''Level 897''' possesses multiple forms due to the evolution of the level from its original form, also referred to as "the True Form" or "the Impossible Form". Upon exiting the level, a traveler will undergo an automatic transformation into one of five forms. The presence of a stable, unalterable form within a level remains uncertain, posing challenges for escape even with multiple exits available. ==Explorations== ===Group Explorations=== No explorations will be made due to changing zones. ===One-Person Explorations === ==== Daniel Smithson ==== {{POI|name=Daniel Smithson|status=Missing|location=[[Deeper|Void Zone 0.12]] The possible location will be updated soon when the author re-releases the page.|affiliations=[[Backrooms Today]]|seen='''Level 897'''}} According to reports, Daniel Smithson, a contributor to [[Backrooms Today]], purportedly detailed information about [[Level 34]] and [[Phenomenon 12|The Flicker]] incident in an attempt to share confidential knowledge with his acquaintances. Smithson's intent was to conclude his journal and publicize his findings in the Backrooms Newspaper. Nevertheless, he vanished shortly thereafter. There is speculation that he might be situated in [[The Void]]. It is theorized that the transformation event may have transpired during his presence in form 3, leading to his potential entrapment in a "black hole" that, upon devouring all matter, would subsequently reform the level into a new state. ====Andy Hulkinns==== {{POI|name=Andy Hulkinns|status=Alive|location=[[Level 37]]|affiliations=New Journalist at [[Backrooms Today]]|seen=[[Level 37]]}} Author of first description about form 3, however the document is now outdated. He didn't experience any transformation events in his career. After few days of his adventures, he joined [[Backrooms Today]] to write about events happening in backrooms and diffrent adventures. He's now on a break for 3 [[The Frontrooms|Frontroom]] months, he's currently visiting [[Level 37]]. ==Forms== |-| Appearance 1= =='''Housing Form'''== {{Class 1}} {{Image | file= Housing 897.jpeg | caption-Level= Housing Level | align= right | bordercolor= orange | caption= ''Image of the "Housing" form.''}} =='''Description''' == '''Housing''' is one of the safer areas in this level and it contains four entities. It looks like a room with several paintings on the walls, a round wooden table, four wooden chairs, a green light on a small drawer, white walls, and a green carpet. On the right side of the room, there is a small greenhouse with plants, mushrooms, and other edible food supplies. Inside the greenhouse, you can find Almond Water, but you can't see the outside world as it is not possible to escape from the greenhouse. There are stairs in this area that lead to the same room behind a wooden drawer, but there is a chance of encountering a "Apnesia". Although Apnesia appear to be harmless in this form, there is a slight risk to one's sanity. Wanderers can ascend swiftly before the level changes, with the red front door serving as the only secure way out of the room, as the stairs are replaced. Though this form is safe, there is an event called "The Darkness" that can only occur in this form. It begins by making the rooms darker and adding more entities, like [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]] and [[Entity 5|Clumps]], who may pursue the wanderer through this level which poses a risk to the wanderer's sanity and could be confusing. Fortunately, the event rarely happens. =='''Entities''' == There are only 3 known entities inside this form: [[Entity 10|Skin-Stealers]], [[Entity 5|Clumps]], and the level-exclusive entity called '''Apnesia'''. The 3 entities can appear in any room, but Apnesia, Skin-Stealers and Clumps can only appear during "The Darkness" event. === Apnesia === '''Apnesia''' appears to be a friendly and towering humanoid creature with a face resembling a monster. They are unable to speak, but they want to help travelers by giving them edible mushrooms and Almond Water. If the traveler mistreats the "roommate," Apnesia may react aggressively. Even though they help the traveler feel safe, everything the traveler gives to Apnesia that the creature appreciates and enjoys remains hidden until it is examined closely. If "The Darkness" occurs and the traveler discovers Apnesia hidden in the greenhouse or under the table, something unusual may happen. =='''Transformation Event''' == Every form experiences a '''"Transformation Event."''' As the transformation starts, all of the lightbulbs break, the roommate flees from the danger, the stairs ahead and behind the wanderer disappear, the greenhouse is dark and all of the plants send dangerous gas toward the wanderer, the entire room darkens, and then light reappears in a new form that fits the new environment. =='''Exits''' == * Leaving through the front door leads to [[Level 10]]. * Entering the Greenhouse while it has yellow lights leads to [[Level 18]]. |-| Appearance 2= =='''The Funhouse Form'''== {{Class Ψ|color-h=279|color-s=98%|color-l=49%}} {{Image | file= Smiley Rooms 897.jpeg | caption-Level= Housing Level | align= right | bordercolor= purple | caption= ''Image of "The Funhouse".''}} =='''Description''' == '''The Funhouse''' is among this level's more hazardous variations. Although this level seems to be completely safe, it only contains one entity: "Trytolitis Bacteria." The level itself is most likely infinite because exploration is not possible for extended periods of time. It appears as a room with white walls and doors with strange ball-like creatures with eyes in different colors. It is advisable to locate the exit as soon as possible because this variety contains microorganisms that could harm a wanderer's mental state. The level also has a section with little pools that can lead to [[Level 37]]. It is near impossible to access the rooms that have an enigmatic green light without any special equipment. The majority of the temperature ranges from 0°C [32°F] to 13°C [55.4°F], which is very cold. The wanderers risk freezing or starving to death because there is little to no food, or what is there is not edible. While extremely unusual, there are windows that may also lead to [[Level 4]]. =='''Entities''' == [[File:The Trytolitis Bacteria.jpg|thumb|''Image of Trytolitis Bacteria.'']] The only known agent, "Trytolitis Bacteria," causes hallucinations that lead people to experience their own fear, quickly deteriorates their sanity, seriously damages their mental health, and if left untreated, leads to [[Phenomenon 35|The Wretched Cycle]]. As the bacteria can only survive in water, the only cure is to come into contact with any type of water. Trytolitis Bacteria is mainly found on old or suspicious-looking objects, as well as deteriorated wood. =='''Transformation Event''' == During a transformation, structural elements are destructed, including walls, lightbulbs, and the ceiling. The wanderer is urged to promptly locate an undamaged door that will lead to a randomly generated positive level. =='''Exits''' == Only known exits are: * To [[Level 37]] via smaller pool area * Encountering a window with completely pitch black outside it will lead to [[Level 4]]. |-| Appearance 3= =='''The Original Form/The Impossible Form'''== {{Class 0|hexagon=Σ|class=Sigma|color-h=262|color-s=69%|color-l=44%|safety=Small Amount Of Oxygen|security=Cosmic Properties|entity=Unknown Entity Presence & Unique Geometry}} The True Form is an unchanging and lifeless void without any signs of existence. Inside this mysterious space, unusual shapes challenge conventional logic and blur the line between possibility and impossibility. Trying to define or understand this form is futile, as it induces feelings of unease and insecurity in those who dare to approach it. If one ventures inside, they encounter an overwhelming expanse of emptiness and perplexing geometric forms that defy reality. Once trapped within this realm, there seems to be no escape, and only a fortunate few might stumble upon an exit within an incomprehensible figure. {{Image | file= The True Form 897.jpg | caption-Level= Housing Level | align= right | bordercolor= gray | caption= ''Symbol Of Impossible Geometry.''}} =='''Description'''== Escape from this place seems impossible, as any entities within it are either unidentified or the strange shapes themselves might be seen as entities. While information is limited, most individuals refer to it as an entity. The inevitable descent into madness merely from looking at this cosmic enigma appears to be the only fate for those who succumb to its allure. It defies conventional understanding, encapsulating entire universes within its triangular forms and beyond. The sheer scale of a space spanning 94 billion light years contained within a singular shape is unimaginable to the human mind. The very idea of measurement, description, or physical navigation within this form becomes absurd. Indeed, this symbolic representation is nothing compared to the vastness it contains, similar to gazing upon the entirety of the Milky Way and beyond. This enigmatic and horrifying form has been the subject of legends. Now, one has the opportunity to witness its unfathomable nature contained within a singular shape. ''The only one known in this form is "A Shape?" "Geoveral Shape" ==='''Geoversal Shape'''=== ''The enclosed structure contains shapes that defy conventional understanding, causing unease and disorientation among visitors. The disconcerting sensation experienced within has no rational explanation. Despite this, the structure serves a vital purpose by supplying the surrounding environment with oxygen. However, it has been observed to pose a potential hazard as traces of As2O3 (arsenic poisoning) are surreptitiously introduced, making it imperative for individuals to leave the premises promptly.'' =='''Transformation Event''' == In the beginning a "black hole" is formed sucking in all objects in, after all objects are sucked in, the level transform into a new look. =='''Exits''' == ''Suprisingly there are a few exits here:'' * ''A small house on one of any shapes will lead to [[Level 6]].'' * ''Black Hole will lead to [[Deeper| Void Zone 0.12]]The location will be updated soon when the author re-releases the page.. '' * ''Nocliping might lead to [[Level 898]]''. An Old Form 3 Document has been published, open? {{Fullscreen|content=
Document wrote below is the first document ever to be wrote about this form. It is meant to serve old information, description of wanderers, please refer to this document as outdated. Since the older document is now officialy outdated but will be used for informations about this form. ''With all the respect - M.E.G [Major Explorer Group].''
{{Class Undetermined}} {{Image | file= The True Form 897.jpg | caption-Level= Housing Level | align= right | bordercolor= gray | caption= ''Symbol Of Impossible Geometry.''}} =='''Description'''== ''The True Form appears to be static, a void of nothingness completely devoid of life. The only creatures present seem to consist of shapes that are either impossible or possible. There is no definitive answer to this question, and no experiments could change this. It is difficult to provide a precise description of this form as it evokes feelings of unsafety and insecurity in those who encounter it. It may even pose a threat to the mental well-being of courageous individuals who venture inside, only to be confronted with an infinity of nothingness and unusual, geometrically implausible shapes. There is no way to save those who witness it; they will likely regret entering, as transformation is impossible unless the wanderer finds an exit located on an impossible figure. '' ''There is no hope of escaping this place; it seems impossible. Any entities that might be inside this form are unidentified, or the strange shapes could be considered an entity. There is no information available; however, most people refer to it as an entity. There is no possible way to accept this inevitable fate, that one might go completely insane from just looking into the whole universe. Only a symbol can describe it as a smaller piece; that symbol is the whole universe you are seeing right now. There are triangle-like shapes and more that have all universes inside them. One can't comprehend how a space of 94 billion light years is shown in just one shape. Human minds are not capable of imagining this whole space. One can't measure it, describe it, or go there. This shape, which is a symbol, might seem smaller than one. What if one is told that it is like if one has seen the Milky Way? It is a size of the Andromeda Galaxy combined with the Milky Way. It's difficult to grasp how much smaller one is. This is the impossible form people were talking about, and one now has a chance to look at it. A total horror is just one shape.'' =='''Entities'''== ''The only one known in this form is "A Shape?" ==='''A Shape?'''=== ''The enclosed structure contains shapes that defy conventional understanding, causing unease and disorientation among visitors. The disconcerting sensation experienced within has no rational explanation. Despite this, the structure serves a vital purpose by supplying the surrounding environment with oxygen. However, it has been observed to pose a potential hazard as traces of As2O3 (arsenic poisoning) are surreptitiously introduced, making it imperative for individuals to leave the premises promptly.'' =='''Transformation Event''' == There is no documentation or evidence of a transformation happening. It does, however it is unknown how. =='''Exits''' == ''Suprisingly there is one exit here:'' * ''A small house on one of any shapes will lead to [[Level 6]].''}} |-| Appearance 4= =='''Pipe Rooms Form / Chamber 4'''== {{Class 0|safety=Unsafe|security=Secure|entity=No Entity Presence}} {{Image | file= Pipe Rooms 897.jpeg | caption-Level= Housing Level | align= right | bordercolor= blue | caption= ''Image of the "Chamber 4" form.''}} In '''Chamber 4''', there is a nostalgic atmosphere reminiscent of traditional billiard parlors, with a variety of pipes, sofas, and chairs creating a charming but slightly disheveled environment. There is a faint musty smell in the air, along with subtle signs of fungal growth and occasional appearances of mushrooms in different areas. To progress to the next level or chamber, explorers must solve the puzzle of initiating the pipes in a specific sequence. This will allow access to the next area, which may contain more complex pipe configurations or reveal a ladder leading to Level 1. It is unclear whether subsequent chambers will have a similar pipe-themed design or if they will introduce an entirely different environment, given the temporary nature of Chamber 4. =='''Entities'''== There are no documented entities inside this form. =='''Transformation Event''' == There is no official images or documented transformation, however there is some proof but it is very poorly documented. =='''Exits''' == Ladder may lead to [[Level 1]] Noclips can appear any time anywhere, and can send to any levels that are either negative or positive. |-| Appearance 5= =='''Voting Site Form'''== {{Class Undetermined}} {{Image | file= Voting Site.jpeg | caption-Level= Housing Level | align= right | bordercolor= red | caption= ''Image of the "Voting Site" form.''}} =='''Description'''== Form 5 bears a striking resemblance to a derelict office building frozen in time. The interior is enveloped in darkness, save for a few rooms illuminated by faint, scattered light. The floor is perpetually damp, and the walls are adorned with peeling, desiccated wallpaper. It serves as a refuge for wanderers grappling with the intricacies of self-expression and grappling with difficult decisions. Countless wanderers have ventured into this form, only to keep their encounters shrouded in silence. The elusiveness of this form lends to the inability to capture its essence through documentation, as wanderers cannot fabricate the raw emotions experienced within its confines. =='''Entities'''== There are no documented entities inside this form. =='''Transformation Event''' == There is no documentation of a transformation happening. =='''Exits''' == There are multiple exits in this form that can lead to levels from Level 0 to Level 999. ==Entrances To All Forms== *In [[Level 5]] wanderer can enter through a door labeled "ω897ω" which will lead into this level.
